note: Intended-design diagram from phase ①: the new artifact flow — work/<feature> → report (report/) → /gogo:done → .gogo/changelog, with /gogo:view building the interactive page from the vendored .gogo/resources. Report ⑤ will draw the as-built UML set.

diagrams.title: Artifact flow: work -> report/ -> gogo:done -> changelog; gogo:view renders interactive diagrams from resources
